Operation 'addSubscription' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. data.current_summary: Register a new webhook listener on a view
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook endpoint to listen for changes on a specified view. Requires the tenant identifier and view ID as path parameters. The request body should contain the subscription details including the webhook endpoint URL and any desired event filters. Returns a Subscription object containing the subscription ID and confirmation of the registered listener. This operation enables the automation platform to receive real-time notifications when data in the view changes.
data.reasoning: Description is completely empty, making it impossible for AI agents to understand what inputs are required, what the operation returns, or what side effects occur. Added details about required parameters, expected request body structure, return value, and the operational effect of registering a webhook listener.

message: Operation 'removeSubscription' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Description is empty, leaving AI agents unable to determine required inputs, expected outputs, or the consequences of the operation. Added clarity on path parameters, request body requirements, return value, and the side effect that the webhook listener will stop receiving notifications.

data.current_summary: Remove an existing webhook listener on a view
data.description_suggestion: Removes an existing webhook subscription from a specified view. Requires the tenant identifier and view ID as path parameters. The request body should contain the Unsubscribe object with the subscription ID to be removed. Returns confirmation of the successful removal. After this operation completes, the webhook endpoint will no longer receive notifications for changes to the specified view.
data.reasoning: Description is empty, leaving AI agents unable to determine required inputs, expected outputs, or the consequences of the operation. Added clarity on path parameters, request body requirements, return value, and the side effect that the webhook listener will stop receiving notifications.

message: Operation 'getTestData' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Description is empty, providing no context about the purpose of test data or how it should be used. Added explanation of why test data is useful (validation and preview), clarified the path parameters, and described what the response contains. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation in the subscription setup workflow.

data.current_summary: Returns test data for a view
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves sample test data for a specified view to help validate webhook subscriptions and understand the data structure. Requires the tenant identifier and view ID as path parameters. Returns sample data records that match the view's column selection and filters, allowing automation platforms to preview the data format and content before setting up active subscriptions.
